text:
Suzuhara may refer to:
Tōji Suzuhara, a character from the Neon Genesis Evangelion series.

Tōji Suzuhara, a character from the Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA novel.

Natsumi Suzuhara, a character from the Neon Genesis Evangelions game.

Tōji Suzuhara, a character from the Rebuild of Evangelion film series.
Sakura Suzuhara, a character from the Rebuild of Evangelion film series.
Hikari Suzuhara, a character from the Rebuild of Evangelion film series.
Tsubame Suzuhara, a character from the Rebuild of Evangelion film series.
